results.engine_gap: X-cost iterative mass exile/return loop ('then repeat this process X more times'); requires multi-step resolve with re-entry into the choice/effect cycle
results.notes: No bespoke for this complex iteration.

results.engine_gap: Mount/Vehicle and Aura/Equipment sub-modes (with attach to creature) are gaps
results.notes: Resolves the simplest creature-reanimate mode (+ {2}). The Spree mode-selection UI is engine-gap; AI defaults to creature mode if any creature is in graveyard.

results.engine_gap: Spree mode picker is engine gap; we eagerly emit untap-opp-creatures + double-strike grant
results.notes: Bespoke target_with_callback that grants double strike to chosen creature and untaps all opponent creatures.

results.engine_gap: Becomes-a-copy until end of turn (creature copy continuous effect) is an engine gap
results.notes: Hexproof + untap are doable, but the copy-creature-effect dominates this card; left whole.

results.engine_gap: Crime-based cost reduction is enforced at cast time, not resolve
results.notes: Resolve emits DRAW(2).

results.engine_gap: Exchange-control of two permanents is an engine gap (no exchange primitive)
results.notes: All three Spree modes use exchange; nothing meaningful to wire.

results.engine_gap: Self-exiling sorcery (engine puts spells in graveyard); mass shuffle of hand+graveyard back to library expressed via ZONE_CHANGE events
results.notes: AI-defaults each player to taking the option; emits one DRAW(7) per player.

results.engine_gap: Reveal opponent hand + caster picks card to discard; otherwise face-up exiled card to graveyard. No primitive for hand-card-pick from opponent.
results.notes: Left.

results.engine_gap: Sacrifice-as-additional-cost is engine gap (handled at cast time, not resolve)
results.notes: Resolve emits DRAW(2).

results.engine_gap: Library-tutor-to-graveyard ({1} mode) is full library-search; we surface only the {2} reanimate mode
results.notes: Bespoke target_with_callback in graveyard with MV<=4 enforcement.

results.engine_gap: 'Sacrifice any number of permanents you control' requires interactive multi-sacrifice choice
results.notes: Left.

results.engine_gap: Forced opponent sac/discard with 'rounded up' counts requires interactive opp choice; both modes are engine gaps
results.notes: Surfaces the 'half life rounded up' mode via target opponent + LIFE_CHANGE.

results.engine_gap: Extra combat phase + delayed treasure-on-combat-damage trigger; pump-with-FS doable but not standalone
results.notes: Left.

results.engine_gap: Copy spell + change-target-of-spell are stack-rewriting primitives that aren't generic
results.notes: Left.

results.engine_gap: 'Can't be blocked by more than one creature' restriction is gap; pump+trample wired
results.notes: Emits PT_MODIFICATION + GRANT_KEYWORD(trample) for each creature you control.

results.engine_gap: None (uses open_library_search with Basic/Desert filter)
results.notes: Tutor up to two basic land or Desert cards to battlefield tapped.

results.engine_gap: None (counts creatures in graveyard at resolve)
results.notes: Emits X OBJECT_CREATED events for 2/1 green Varmint tokens.

results.engine_gap: Putting creature cards from hand onto battlefield is engine gap
results.notes: Left.

results.engine_gap: None (computes greatest power among creatures you control)
results.notes: Emits OBJECT_CREATED for an X/X green Elemental token.

results.engine_gap: Graveyard targeting + simultaneous reanimate-and-bounce-from-GY is engine gap
results.notes: Left.

results.engine_gap: Plotting-from-library-look (exile face-up as plotted) is a complex plot subsystem hook
results.notes: Left.

results.engine_gap: None (computes 2 * lands you control)
results.notes: Looks at top X cards, puts the first into hand, rest to bottom in random order.
